title: Wather Scary
description: Are you a cat? Are you afraid of water? Now you can do this in Minecraft!
body:
## First simplified version. Exclusively sound and illusory damage... > The damage is visual and does not cause real damage. A simple mod that adds visual damage while in the water. The sound is also played at the level.
The longer you are in the water, the more often shaking.
![Screenshot 2025-04-04 225929](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/81cce3af-12ff-4baf-befb-3fedd661bf2e)
## Plans: ❌ add a mode switch
❌ add some integrations
🕑 settings menu
❌ ability to turn on real damage (single-player)
